title: hevea microphylla
intro: Hevea microphylla, also known as the rubber tree or babà, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The medicinal properties of Hevea microphylla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hevea microphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and hypertension. Hevea microphylla is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves, bark, or roots in hot water or a solvent.
